name: RoMidi
author: Panda Hub
description: The most versatile autoplayer on Roblox — Piano, Drum, and Guitar in one script. Rich humanization suite with chord rolling, hand drift, tempo sway, and mistake simulation. Includes 88-key mode, local MIDI support, persistent settings, and a polished draggable UI. Fully supports mobile and PC executors.
howToUse:
1. Get a key via the key system on the RoMidi website
2. Paste the script into your executor (Delta, ArceusX, Xeno, Synapse all work)
3. Enter your key when prompted
4. Pick your instrument — Piano, Drum, or Guitar
5. Choose a preset song or load a local MIDI file from your device
6. Adjust humanization settings to taste, then hit Play
